verified: deterministic mountain, foothill, plains, and urban-edge region selection from route position
collision-free near, midground, distant, and continuous terrain layers streamed with direct route chunks
zero measured outer terrain seam across adjacent same-edge stream chunks
procedural objects grounded to the same route-distance terrain surface used by the ribbon
local-origin rebase and eviction behavior across five deterministic review stages
strict terrain geometry degradation across high, balanced, low, and graybox profiles
equivalent route, streaming, region, collision, and semantic behavior across all four quality profiles
renderer-backed dawn, day, overcast, night, and stream-boundary review capture
project-original rights record for the procedural technical baseline
completion_pending: Q-021 final representative-region art direction and readability approval
Q-022 declared minimum target Windows PC and quantitative renderer budgets
production terrain, vegetation, structure, skyline, weather, texture, and LOD assets
final rights records for any replacement production assets
excluded_claims: ratified GPU frame time, draw call, texture residency, occlusion, or memory budgets
hosted CI or Apple M4 Max as the declared minimum Windows game PC
terrain collision, route elevation changes, or vehicle-physics changes

acceptance_comparisons.criterion: regional scenery is deterministic and streamed from route position plus stable seed
acceptance_comparisons.observed: all four quality runs visited the same 49 chunk identities, four region bands, five stages, and five rebases; terrain relief and palette are stable functions of authoritative route distance

acceptance_comparisons.criterion: environment presentation cannot alter authoritative road or collision
acceptance_comparisons.observed: every recursively inspected environment subtree was collision-free, the environment collision budget remained zero, and the complete road/collision smoke suite passed

acceptance_comparisons.criterion: terrain streams continuously without defeating quality tiers
acceptance_comparisons.observed: all 24 loaded ribbons reported a 0.0000 m maximum same-edge seam while triangle counts decreased strictly from 3656 to 1880 to 984 to 536

acceptance_comparisons.criterion: representative states are renderer-reviewable without voids or persistent seams
acceptance_comparisons.observed: the tracked six-frame contact sheet and original 534-frame capture cover dawn mountains, day foothills, overcast plains, urban-edge night, and a daylight stream-boundary return with no observed terrain crack or exposed void

output_artifacts.retention: local review artifact; the tracked contact sheet is durable

failure_logs.failure: The initial ribbon pass placed environment instances at road elevation while the surrounding terrain rose and fell.
failure_logs.recovery: Object placement now samples the shared route-distance terrain-height function used by the ribbon.

failure_logs.failure: The first mesh review used identical triangle winding on both lateral sides, producing downward normals on one side.
failure_logs.recovery: Side-aware triangle winding now keeps both ribbon surfaces upward-facing before normal generation.

recovery_result: All autonomous terrain-continuity, geometry-budget, collision-isolation, local-origin, renderer-capture, and regression gates pass; production art, final rights, and target-Windows-PC performance approval remain explicitly open.

human_gate.name: Representative-region art direction, readability, final rights, and target-Windows budget approval
